title: Download all Files of all file columns and all item attachments simultaneously (of an item)
excerpt: Hello, it is great if you can use a formula to upload e.g. CVs or personnel data in a file column. It would be ideal if you could download all files per item at the same time. Is that possible? Because if you have to cli…

posts.author: dbaldacom (Dominik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, it is great if you can use a formula to upload e.g. CVs or personnel data in a file column. It would be ideal if you could download all files per item at the same time. Is that possible? Because if you have to click on each file individually in order to download it, the process is so complicated that you might consider not using it because it’s too time-consuming.
